info.title: De Vrije Hond API
info.description: Typed contract between the De Vrije Hond website/API (apps/web) and the Expo mobile app. Generated from Zod schemas in @devrijehond/types. The community-driven map of dog-friendly spots, public reads are anonymous + CDN-cacheable; user-scoped writes live under `/me/*`.

bearerAuth.description: BetterAuth-issued session token. Session cookies are the canonical auth for the website; the bearer scheme is used by the Expo mobile client and documented here for SDK compatibility.

UserRole.description: Application role. `USER` = mobile app + website. `ADMIN` = moderation safety-net.

SpotType.description: Kind of spot. `REGION` = polygon area (off-leash zone, swim beach). `POI` = point.

SpotStatus.description: Moderation lifecycle. `UNVERIFIED` = live, awaiting community confirmation. `VERIFIED` = net weighted score reached threshold. `HIDDEN`/`REMOVED` = admin-only.

VoteValue.description: Community verification vote. `CONFIRM` raises the score, `DENY` lowers it.

ReportReason.description: Why a piece of content was reported.

ReportTarget.description: What kind of entity a report targets.

FeatureStatus.description: Product-roadmap state of a community feature request.

GeoPoint.description: A geographic point, latitude/longitude in WGS84.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. Safe to display to end users.
message.example: categoryId is not a valid UUID.

details.description: Optional structured detail payload. For validation errors this is the Zod `flatten()` output.

ApiError.description: Uniform error envelope used by every API endpoint.

icon.description: Icon name (Tabler on web, mapped to SF Symbol / Material on mobile).

categoryIds.description: Categories this amenity applies to (from `AmenityOnCategory`). Empty = applicable everywhere.

AmenitiesResponse.description: All visible, active amenities with their category mapping.

coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinates. Point → `[lng, lat]`. Polygon → `[[[lng, lat], …]]` (one or more linear rings, first/last point equal).

SpotGeometry.description: GeoJSON geometry (WGS84). Point for a POI, Polygon for a REGION. Coordinate order is [longitude, latitude].

SpotPhoto.description: One photo attached to a spot.

verifiedAt.description: When the spot reached VERIFIED, or null.

SpotAuthor.description: Public reference to the user who submitted the spot.

photoUrl.description: First photo URL for the list thumbnail, or null.

SpotSummary.description: Lightweight spot summary for map markers + list rows.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page, or null when this is the last page.

SpotsMapResponse.description: Individual spots plus clustered groups within the requested viewport.

count.description: Number of spots in this cluster.

MapCluster.description: A clustered group of nearby spots on the map.

hours.description: Opening-hours structure (loose JSON, validated at the API boundary).

SpotDetail.description: Full spot detail. Server-rendered as the crawlable spot page.

coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinates. Point → `[lng, lat]`; Polygon → `[[[lng, lat], …]]`.

allOf.description: Single lat/lng for a POI. Alternative to `geometry`.

polygon.description: Polygon ring (≥ 3 lat/lng points) for a REGION. Alternative to `geometry`. The API closes the ring.

photos.description: Uploaded photo URLs (the client uploads to S3 first, then submits the resulting URLs).

hours.description: Opening-hours structure (loose JSON, validated at the boundary).

SubmitSpotRequest.description: Body for `POST /api/v1/me/spots`. A submitted spot goes live immediately as UNVERIFIED.

hours.description: Opening-hours structure (loose JSON, validated at the API boundary).

coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinates. Point → `[lng, lat]`; Polygon → `[[[lng, lat], …]]`.

allOf.description: Voter's current location, used for the proximity gate. When present and within range the vote is marked `proximityVerified` and weighted more heavily.

Vote.description: The signed-in user's vote on a spot.

netScore.description: Spot net weighted score after this vote.

status.description: Spot status after recompute (may flip to VERIFIED / HIDDEN).

VoteResponse.description: Result of casting a verification vote.

author.description: Public reference to the review author.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page, or null when this is the last page.

targetId.description: Id of the spot / photo / review being reported.

ReportResponse.description: Acknowledgement that a report was filed.

component.description: Area of the app this concerns.

viewerHasVoted.description: Whether the signed-in user has upvoted. False for anonymous reads.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page, or null when this is the last page.

component.description: Area of the app: Kaart / Inzenden / Profiel / Anders.

FeatureVoteResponse.description: Result of toggling an upvote on a feature request.

schema.description: When true, collapse dense viewport grid cells into `clusters` (count bubbles) and return only lone spots in `items`, keeping the payload bounded. When false/omitted, every spot is returned in `items`.
